name: Prancing Pony Council Room
description:
You are in the Council room of the Prancing Pony Inn.  By decree of the High
Council of Arda, this room has been fashioned to keep the people informed of
the goings on in Minas Tirith.  The walls are painted white and the room is
clean and fresh.  Here you can rest, relax, and update yourself with current
events.  A sign is posted here.
